free_text: Activation cross-sections of osmium isotopes with fast
T(d,n)alpha reaction. The neutron yield was about
12 cm3 Ge(Li) detector with a resolution (FWHM)
of 3.5 keV at 661 keV and a 100 cm3 Ge(Li) detector
with a resolution of 2.5 keV at 1332 keV. Energy
calibration was performed with IAEA standard sources.
No information on source of uncertainties
Data from Uray's private comm. (9 April 1975)
no actual change but move the standards to each sub-
entry and corresponding modifications of data sections
Decay data are from V.Berg et al.,Nucl.Phys.A143(1970)
used here as standard, is slightly different from
Nagel's final value which is compiled in

mistake in author's private comm., because Os-191-m
has 100% internal transition with only 74 keV gamma.
The 129 keV line appears only in the Os-191-g decay.
